title: Require Service oRPC Composition
forbids: a standalone root outside the local createServiceImplementer relation or direct Effect-oRPC implementEffect relation with immediate context, an API root outside native implement plus root context, a module disconnected from its imported root implementer, or a top-level operation terminal visibly rooted in that module outside its single router.ts
why: The contract-to-implementer, implementer-to-module, and visible module-to-operation relations keep the standard oRPC service flow explicit while admitting direct Effect-oRPC construction without an extra wrapper.
remediate: Export standalone impl through createServiceImplementer from ./base or direct implementEffect with immediate root context; construct embedded API service through native implement plus root context; derive each module directly from ../../impl; and place top-level operation bindings visibly rooted in that module in router.ts.
message: Service composition must preserve the contract, implementer, module, and operation flow.
